session.user: Run these tests and report results: uv run pytest tests/commands/pr/test_dispatch.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_helpers.py tests/commands/dispatch/test_workflow_config.py -v Report the pass/fail status of each test.
session.assistant: I'll run these tests and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on dispatch-related test files with verbose output

session.tool_result:
